title: polemonium pulcherrimum subvar. shastense
intro: Polemonium pulcherrimum subvar. shastense is a subvariety of the Sky Pilot (Polemonium pulcherrimum), a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of western North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Polemonium pulcherrimum subvar. shastense include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
